hardware.note: VF = virtualized fraction of the GPU; number is not a hardware peak

caveats: HuggingFace eager backend is unoptimized; vLLM / llama.cpp-ROCm would be substantially faster on MI300X.
MI300X VF (virtualized) — not the full physical GPU.
1.5B model: proves the local-AI triage pipeline runs on AMD hardware; production security triage should use a 7B+ model (the 1.5B verdict was low quality).
